name: Jiangxi Hungpai New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Hungpai New Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells silane coupling agent and rubber additives worldwide. It also offers anti-reversion agents, antioxidant agents, manufacturing additive agents, prevent blooming agents, raw chemical materials, silicone products series, fumed silica, and anti-adherent agent. Its products are used in green tires, semiconductor, solar, and rubber products industries. The company serves tire manufacturers and international brands. Jiangxi Hungpai New Material Co., Ltd. is based in Jingdezhen, China.
